description: Create a STAR NPC holon and attach a live ElevenLabs conversational voice agent in one sequence. Demonstrates the STAR + ElevenLabs pipeline no other IDE has.

steps.description: Browse available voice profiles to select one matching the NPC's personality before creating the agent.
notes: Returns an array of { voice_id, name, labels } objects.
Filter by labels (e.g. 'deep', 'authoritative', 'raspy') to find a match.
Save the chosen voice_id for step 3.

steps.description: Register the NPC as a STAR holon linked to the logged-in Avatar.

parameters.{npcBackstory}: Background, history, and context for AI generation (string)
parameters.{npcRole}: In-game role, e.g. 'Corrupt Detective', 'Bar Owner', 'Street Fixer' (string)
parameters.{personalityTraits}: Comma-separated personality traits used to tune dialogue and voice, e.g. 'intimidating, world-weary, clipped speech' (string)

notes: Requires STAR WebAPI running and Avatar beam-in.
Returns { success: true, data: { id, name, ... } }.
Save the returned id as starHolonId for step 4.

example.name: Martinez
example.description: A detective in his 40s who has seen too much. Works both sides of the law for the right price.
example.personality: intimidating, world-weary, clipped speech, takes bribes

steps.description: Create a live conversational ElevenLabs agent using the NPC's personality as the system prompt.

parameters.{npcName}: Must match the NPC name used in step 2
parameters.{systemPromptBuiltFromPersonality}: In-character system prompt: 'You are {name}. {backstory}. Speak in {personality} style. Stay in character at all times.'

notes: Requires ELEVENLABS_API_KEY set in the IDE main process env (Settings > Integrations).
Save agent_id alongside starHolonId in the workspace output file.

steps.description: Persist the NPC's STAR holon ID and ElevenLabs agent_id to workspace so the game server can wire them in.
notes: This file is the contract between the IDE and the game server.
The server uses starHolonId to read personality/inventory via OASIS API.
The server uses elevenLabsAgentId to open a real-time voice session via ElevenLabs SDK.

agent_prompt_summary: Use star_create_npc to register the NPC in STAR, then elevenlabs_create_agent to give them a voice. Save both IDs to npcs/{name}.json.
